/usr/bin/cmake -E rm -f CMakeFiles/husk_external.dir/objects.a
/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar qc CMakeFiles/husk_external.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles/husk_external.dir/objects1.rsp
/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-g++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -static -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles/husk_external.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o ../../bin/husk_external.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libhusk_external.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles/husk_external.dir/linkLibs.rsp
